summary: PR / issue / repo queries and class-2 write verbs via the authenticated `gh` CLI. Apply mode writes; propose mode previews without calling gh.

commands.summary: List pull requests for a repo filtered by state and limit.
Fetch one PR by number with title, body, diff counts, files, commits, and refs.
List issues for a repo filtered by state and labels with limit.
Return repo metadata: default branch, stars, open issue count, last push timestamp.
Post a comment on a pull request. Propose mode previews; apply mode writes. Class-2 — must be gated by work-graph approval class ≥ 2 or refused in Ghost Shift.
